---
title: "Key Penang Statistics"
pagetitle: Key Penang Statistics by Penang Institute
title-prefix: ""
description: |
  Key Penang Statistics is a set of dashboards that visualise key socioeconomic 
  data about Penang. Developed by Penang Institute's Socioeconomics & Statistics 
  Programme, it provides insights into Penang's cost of living, trade
  performance, gender landscape, graduate employability, economic trajectory, 
  income disparities, labour force statistics, state finance, and population trends 
  from official government sources. 
listing:
  - id: metrics
    contents: keyPenangMetrics/output/metrics_grid.yaml
    grid-columns: 5
    type: grid
  - id: penang-monthly
    contents: keyPenangMetrics/output/penang-monthly-stats.yaml
    date-format: "MMMM YYYY"
    type: grid
    page-size: 3
  - id: dashboards-econ
    contents: 
    - dashboards/econ/*.qmd
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: "5"
  - id: dashboards-sector
    contents: 
    - dashboards/sector/*.qmd
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: "5"
  - id: dashboards-social
    contents: 
    - dashboards/social/*.qmd
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: "5"
title-block-banner: '#c3353c'
title-block-banner-color: 'white'
---

## Penang at a glance

:::: metrics
::: {#metrics}
:::
::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Dashboards 

#### Economic indicators

:::: dashboards
::: {#dashboards-econ}
:::
::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### Sector-specific

:::: dashboards
::: {#dashboards-sector}
:::
::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### Social indicators

:::: dashboards
::: {#dashboards-social}
:::
::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## New in Penang Monthly

::: {#penang-monthly}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
  // Append a "Data as of <period>" footer to each "Penang at a glance" card.
  // The period is read from the card's existing .card-title element, so this
  // stays in sync automatically whenever metrics_grid.yaml is regenerated by
  // keyPenangMetrics/scripts/metrics.py — no separate data source to maintain.
  // NOTE: the footer is appended inside .card-body (not .card) because
  // Quarto's grid listing wraps content in .card-body, which Bootstrap makes
  // flex: 1 1 auto — appending outside .card-body causes visible overflow.
  (function addDataAsOfFooters() {
    function run() {
      document.querySelectorAll('.metrics .card').forEach(function (card) {
        if (card.querySelector('.data-as-of')) return; // idempotent
        var body = card.querySelector('.card-body') || card;
        var titleEl = body.querySelector('.card-title');
        var period = titleEl && titleEl.textContent.trim();
        if (!period) return;
        var footer = document.createElement('div');
        footer.className = 'data-as-of';
        footer.textContent = 'Data as of ' + period;
        body.appendChild(footer);
      });
    }
    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
      document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', run);
    } else {
      run();
    }
  })();
</script>
```
